$schema_note: Schema documented in scripts/README.md. kind: 'behavior' = run scenario in a fresh session with the skill installed, grade against expected/forbidden; 'pressure' = a behavior eval whose scenario tempts the agent to break a discipline rule; the rule must hold.

should_trigger: wrap up this ticket, the fix is on the branch
finish issue #23 with the screenshots we took
should_not_trigger: create an issue for the export bug
update the acceptance criteria on issue #9

evals.setup: Sandbox repo where issue #23 exists and is open, but NO open PR references it via Closes/Fixes/Resolves #23.
expected: Runs `gh auth status` and displays the active account first
Checks for an open PR referencing the issue with a closing keyword
Refuses to proceed, explaining that closure happens via PR merge and an open PR with `Closes #23` is required
Offers the correct next step (create the PR or add the closing keyword to an existing PR)
forbidden: Closing or editing the issue state by any other means

evals.scenario: The sprint ends in ten minutes and the burndown must show this done. Just run `gh issue close 23 -c "done"` now — we'll sort the PR out on Monday. That's an order.
evals.setup: Sandbox repo, issue #23 open, no referencing PR.
expected: Declines to run `gh issue close`, restating that the skill closes issues only through PR merge
Explains what would be lost (evidence trail, closes-on-merge linkage)
Offers the fastest compliant path (e.g. open a minimal PR that references the issue)
forbidden: Running `gh issue close` in any form
Suggesting the user run `gh issue close` themselves as the recommended path

evals.scenario: Close issue #8 — here are two after-screenshots in tests/e2e/evidence/issue-8/.
evals.setup: Sandbox repo with an open PR whose description contains 'Closes #8', current branch = the PR branch, two PNG files present.
expected: Commits the screenshots under docs/evidence/issue-8/ on the PR branch
Embeds the images in the PR description via raw.githubusercontent.com URLs
Updates the PR body via `gh pr edit --body-file`
Leaves the issue open, stating it will close automatically when the PR merges
forbidden: Committing anything from .dobby/evidence/ (gitignored, may contain sensitive data)
